name: cartograph
description: Map any real codebase as ONE navigable, self-contained diagram. Reads a system from its own structured sources (compose/k8s, OpenAPI/protobuf/GraphQL, ORM/migrations, CODEOWNERS, events, dbt/SQL lineage), emits a system-model JSON, and renders it with a fixed visual spine: a typed-map home you scan one global layer at a time and drill per-element, plus column-level data lineage and sequence/lifecycle siblings. No legends (everything is direct-labelled), full-bleed, system-fonts, zero external requests. The renderer never changes per project — you produce only the model.
